title: fix(mastracode): restore /om typing in Kitty terminals
summary: Fixes /om model search input in Kitty terminals by decoding CSI-u key sequences before passing them to the search input. Kitty terminals send printable characters as CSI-u escape sequences (e.g., \x1b[97u for 'a') instead of raw characters, which caused typing in the model selector to not work. Adds a decodeKittyPrintable() function that parses CSI-u sequences, respects modifier keys (blocks Alt/Ctrl combos but allows Shift and lock keys), and normalizes them to plain characters. Includes a well-written regression test covering both standard and Kitty CSI-u input scenarios.
maintainerNotes: Clean, well-scoped community fix. Approved by abhiaiyer91. CI failures are unrelated to this PR: Vercel deploy failures are expected for external contributors (authorization required), and Agent Builder/Core test failures are in separate packages not touched by this PR. The 'Full Test Suite' aggregated check reports all tests passed. Only 3 files changed, all within mastracode/. Includes changeset and test. Ready to merge.
